titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 31: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 31. (A.R. No. B 44 of 1995-96.) TIRUVIŚALŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west kumuda portion, Pichchadēvar shrine, Śivayōganāthasvāmin temple.

Damaged and incomplete. Records that Aḍigaḷ Paḻuvēṭṭaraiyar Maravaṉ Kaṇḍaṉ endowed one thousand vāśi paḍāda-Īḻakkāśu for dānam for chaturvēdi-bhaṭṭar into the temple of Tiruviśalūr-Paramasvāmigaḷ in the dēvadāna-brahmadēyam, Avaṉinārāyaṇachchaturvēdimaṅgalam on the northern bank (of Kāvēri). It appears that the amount was lent out probably to a sabhā and the interest on the endowed amount 2000 kalam of paddy per annum was to be defrayed at the rate of ten nāḻi of paddy to each of the such chaturvēdi-bhaṭṭas, who were blemishless, daily. Also it seems that a service to be named dāna-vinōdan was to be conducted in the same temple every month on the day of Uttiraṭṭādi, the asterism of the donor, from the interest.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 5Āvatu vaṭakarai tevatāṉabrahmadeyam Avaninārāyaṇacaturvvedimaṅkalattut tiruvicalūr
paramasvāmikaḷ koyilil Aṭikaḷ paḻaveṭṭaraiyar maṟavaṉ kaṇṭaṉ Ivvūr caturvvetibhaṭṭatāṉam vaitta paricāvatu It
tāṉattukku bhogamāka vaitta poṉ �1 mṉāl vācipaṭāta Īḻakkācu Āyiraṅkācum Ittāṉaviṉodaṉ caturvvetibhaṭṭatāṉap perumakkaḷukku
tāṉamāka niroṭu Aṭṭi kuṭutta Ikkācukaḷukkup pū vaḻi kāciṉvāy nellu virutti Aṭṭuvārkkut tanicukkāka kuṭuttu Ivviruttiyāl vanta Ira
ṇṭāyirak kalam Iṉṉellut tiruvicalūrparama paḻuveṭṭaraiyar maṟavaṉ kaṇṭaṉu muḷḷiṭṭu Ayma caturvvetibhaṭṭakaḷ meṟpaṭu kuṟṟamillātār
nicatam patiṉāḻi nellu perāl koḷḷappeṟuvatākavum Ikkācu tanicu koṇṭa ṟuti pūvaṟuti Ittāṉa sabhaiyārkke kuṭuttu tam perāl peṟuvārākavum Ivar piṟanta nāḷ
Uttirāṭṭātināṉṟu māsan toṟum Iśrī koyilile dānaviṉodaṉ ṉeṉṉun tiru Ikkācu mutalilaḻikkap peṟā(ā)tatākavum māṭa peṟātārākavum grāmadrohikaḷāy Irupat
tu Aiṅkaḻaiñcu poṉ taṇṭappaṭuvārkaḷākavum Ipparicu cantirātittavaṟ niṟ ten
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 31 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
